title: Relationship Manager, International Banking
description:
about the company

Our client is a  leading international banking group focused on emerging markets, prioritizing sustainable growth.

about the job

  • Conduct professional, consultative financial analysis and profiling sessions with customers to identify and meet their unique financial needs and objectives.

  • Foster and deepen customer relationships by providing regular market updates and trend analysis on both local and international financial products.

  • In consultation with team leaders and branch management, develop monthly plans to achieve and exceed sales targets, business growth, and customer acquisition goals.

  • Proactively participate in marketing and promotional activities to acquire new clients and source individual prospects through various channels.

  • Provide high-quality, efficient after-sales service and manage client retention strategies to minimize attrition.

  • Organize and conduct professional sales presentations for groups, clubs, associations, and corporate organizations.

skills and experience required

  • A degree or diploma in a relevant field such as Business, Banking, Finance, or Accounting, or equivalent practical experience.

  • Demonstrated experience within the Banking or Financial Services sector, showing a strong understanding of industry standards and products. 

  • Good track record in sales/current portfolio of clients.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function.

(EA: 94C3609/ R24124496)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
